phase: Phase 11 — Final Frontend QA Before Backend

checks.authRoles: 6 PRD roles and 6 role landing dashboards configured
checks.apiReadiness: 20 files and 12 API readiness markers verified

importantFixesDuringPhase11: Fixed START_HERE_OFFLINE.html so it is now a lightweight launcher instead of a large inline Vite entry file.
Escaped inline script closing tags in the standalone generator to prevent offline preview script parsing issues.
Confirmed npm run dev starts without Vite dependency-scan failure after the offline launcher fix.
knownNonBlockingWarning: Vite warns that the main JavaScript chunk is larger than 500 kB. This does not break the app. Route-level code splitting is recommended after backend integration or during performance optimization.
recommendedNextStep: Begin backend foundation: PostgreSQL schema, Express/TypeScript API, Prisma, JWT auth, role permissions, and core patient/order/lab/scan/billing endpoints.
